Largo Home Loans

FHA loans in Largo, Florida

Tucked between Clearwater and St. Petersburg, Largo offers some of the best value in central Pinellas County — a mix of single-family homes, condos, and 55-and-over communities just minutes from the Gulf beaches. That affordability makes FHA especially useful here, with the statewide loan limit covering most homes and 3.5% down putting ownership within reach.

Pinellas County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Largo

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Largo home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Largo's affordable market, that covers the large majority of homes for sale. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Pinellas County's exact figure with HUD.

Tampa Bay value with FHA in Largo

Largo's central-Pinellas location and attainable prices make it a smart FHA choice — beach access without beach prices. Single-family homes are straightforward FHA purchases; for condos and 55+ communities, confirm the building is FHA-approved or qualifies for Single-Unit Approval (and that you'll occupy it) via our condo guide. First-time buyers can pair FHA with Florida assistance.

Down payment help for Largo buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Largo buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Pinellas County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Largo

We help buyers throughout Largo and Pinellas County, including East Largo, Belleair, and the Indian Rocks Beach area. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Largo (Pinellas County) for 2026?+
Pinellas County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most Largo homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Largo?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — enough for most Largo homes.
Can I buy a Largo condo with FHA?+
Yes, if the building is FHA-approved or the unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval and you'll live there. We check first.
How much down payment do I need in Largo?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Pinellas County?+
Yes — Largo, Clearwater, St. Petersburg, and surrounding communities.
